reviews.review_description: I installed on how and when I get to where  you see the  controller with red light nothing happens  red  light beam dosent move just points straight  only  thing I can do is quit game  because if I hold the controller  recalibrate button on my go controller it does nothing and if I quick push the button the quit game option comes up

Aliens finish like two bingos before you even finish one. Could have been a fun game, but for whatever reason they have seen to it that you can't win. About ten games played to make sure not just a run of bad luck. Annoying game. Uninstalled.

developer_response.body: You know, Aliens! Am I Right!? We talked to them about their zealot-like attitude when it comes to BINGO, but they just would not listen. So we Independence-Day Jeff-Goldblum-ed a piece of code to curb their enthusiasm. Loading bar and all. It ought to slow them down a bit if you want to give it a try!

reviews.review_description: I got this game to work, but it was on a differant platform. Rift, I think.
You can only play one game every 4 hours.

reviews.review_title: Can not get pass first part
reviews.review_description: Having the same problem can’t get into the game very disappointing

Bingo is one of my favorite games to play but no matter how many bingos I get I can’t beat the aliens.  It seems they want you to PAY for more cards.. but even then that doesn’t guarantee you’ll beat the aliens.

You mentioned a code that could help but don’t say what it is.  Is there a secret to winning or is just about selling more cards?

I would gladly raise my rating if I could defeat the aliens at least once in a while.


12/30/19 update:
Ok so I actually broke down and BOUGHT some more cards but I cannot determine how to activate/use them!

1/13/20 update:
I determined on my own that you cannot play multiple cards at once.. just card after card as you lose each game.

Even purchasing cards does not help you get enough bingos to ever beat the aliens.  Sadly I have reduced my rating to 1 star.. a game is NOT fun if you can never win.

developer_response.body: Hi!  It is true that Alines are tricky, but we have verified that the game can be won. Maybe there is an issue which you are encountering that we have not seen. Please reach out to us via email ( contact@babaroga.com ), and we will attempt to help out.  Also, the board amount total is incremented as soon as the purchase is made. There are no additional steps required. Lastly, the update with multiple cards (up to three) is coming later this month, around the end of January.

reviews.review_description:
I’d love to give this game 5 stars because I play it the most. 

Unfortunately if I play this game for more than 5-10 minutes it crashes my headset and I have to reboot. 

The headset gets pretty hot quickly and if you don’t have a means to keep it cool it’ll crash in less than  5 minutes. 

I’d also like to add that this game is very beatable. I’m not sure what other reviewers are talking about unless they’re extremely slow players.
